zh.lifeSummary: Simeon Coolidge是Alice Lane的兒子，於1532年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾坎布利其。他於1561年與Agnes Kingston在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1590年11月10日在他的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國坎布利其爾可頓哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Simeon Coolidge是Alice Lane的儿子，于1532年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾坎布利其。他于1561年与Agnes Kingston在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1590年11月10日在他的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在英国坎布利其爾可頓哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Coolidge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: probably an occupational name for acollege servant or someone with some other association with auniversity college, for example a tenant farmer who farmed one of themany farms in England known as College Farm, most of which are or wereowned by university colleges.

variants.name: Colledge
meanings: English (Midlands and northern England): habitational name from Colwich in Staffordshire, named from Old English col ‘(char)coal’ + wīc ‘building’. The name has become associated with the familiar word college.

nameMeanings.name: Simeon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from a Hebrew word meaning ‘hearkening’. It is borne by several Old and New Testament characters, rendered in the Authorized Version variously as Shimeon, Simeon, and Simon. In the New Testament, it is the spelling used for the man who blessed the infant Christ (Luke 2:25).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: Simeon Coolidge was born in 1532, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Alice Lane. He married Agnes Kingston in 1561, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 10 November 1590, in his hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Simeon Coolidge est né en 1532, à Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Alice Lane. Il a épousé Agnes Kingston en 1561, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 10 novembre 1590, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Simeon Coolidge wurde 1532 in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Alice Lane geboren. Er hat 1561 in England Agnes Kingston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 10. November 1590 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Simeon Coolidge è nato il nel 1532 nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Alice Lane. Lui sposato Agnes Kingston nel 1561, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 10 novembre 1590, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Simeon Coolidgeは1532年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジでAlice Laneの息子として生まれた。1561年にイギリスでAgnes Kingstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1590年11月10日に故郷で58歳で死去し，イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアコッテンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Simeon Coolidge(은)는 1532년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 Alice Lane의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1561년 영국에서 Agnes Kingston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1590년 11월 10일 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 캄브리지실르 컷함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Simeon Coolidge nasceu em 1532, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Alice Lane. Ele casou-se com Agnes Kingston em 1561, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de novembro de 1590, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Simeon Coolidge родился в 1532 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. Его мать звали Alice Lane. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Kingston в 1561 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 10 ноября 1590 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности коттенам, камбриджешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Simeon Coolidge nació en 1532, en Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Alice Lane. Se casó con Agnes Kingston en 1561, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de noviembre de 1590, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.
